title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birla Tyres Holdings Services:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres Holdings Services!
